name: Result
summary: Defines enumerated constant values for several command result types.

enum_values.name: Nothing
enum_values.summary: Command did nothing but cancel was not pressed.

enum_values.name: Failure
enum_values.summary: Command failed (bad input, computational problem, etc.)

enum_values.name: UnknownCommand
enum_values.summary: Command not found (user probably had a typo in command name).
